header.title: Billing & Subscription
header.description: Manage your subscription plan and billing information.

paymentCancel.title: Payment Cancelled
paymentCancel.description: You have cancelled the payment. No charges were made.

paymentSuccess.paidDescription: Your plan has been activated. Thank you for using our service!
paymentSuccess.pendingDescription: Your transaction is being processed. Please wait a moment and check the billing page.
paymentSuccess.failedDescription: The transaction was cancelled or has expired. Please try again.

plans.title: Available Plans
plans.loadFailed: Failed to load plans. Please refresh the page.

currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.empty: You don't have a plan yet. Select one below to get started.
currentPlan.pendingPaymentDescription: Your subscription has been created but is not yet paid. Please complete the payment to activate it.
currentPlan.trialEndsOn: Trial ends on {date}. Upgrade to continue using the service after the trial.
currentPlan.selectPlanHint: Select a plan to view details.
